app.name: Need Taxi
app.tagline: Safe, fast, and stress-free transfers. Wherever you are, we’re there.

slide1.title: Welcome!
slide1.text:
Enjoy without worries.
We take care of the transport.

slide2.title: ANYWHERE IN TENERIFE
slide2.text:
Service across the island, airport transfers, beaches, and tourist areas.
Coverage in the Canary Islands.

slide4.title: FAST AND SECURE
slide4.text:
We arrive in minutes.
Professional drivers for a journey with total peace of mind.

intro_form.title: Manage Booking
intro_form.subtitle: Quickly view or cancel your transfer.

airport.title: Airport Transfers
airport.text: Direct connection to Tenerife South (TFS) and Tenerife North (TFN). No waiting.

price.title: Fixed Price
price.text: Know the cost of your journey before you get in. No surprises or hidden fees.

coverage.title: Total Coverage
coverage.text: From Santa Cruz to Costa Adeje. We reach every corner of the island.

adapted.title: Adapted Fleet
adapted.text: 100% accessible vehicles for people with reduced mobility (PRM).

header.title: Our Services
header.subtitle: Discover everything Need Taxi can do for you during your stay in the Canary Islands.

tours.title: Excursions and Tours
tours.text: Discover Teide National Park, Masca, or Garachico with our expert local drivers.

business.title: Business Service
business.text: Corporate transfer management, monthly billing, and priority support for your employees.

app.title: Book from the App
app.text: Download our free app. Track your taxi in real-time and manage your bookings easily.
